groupings.title: Product Definition
groupings.description: Clarify product intent, prototype fidelity, and buildable requirements before coding.

groupings.title: Project Setup
groupings.description: Choose the framework, repository foundation, and collaboration workflow for product-grade prototypes.

groupings.title: UI Composition
groupings.description: Initialize design systems, architect layout skeletons, and govern UI consistency as the project evolves.

groupings.title: IA & Flows
groupings.description: Map pages, routes, user journeys, and page hierarchy before visual design or implementation.

groupings.title: Build Readiness
groupings.description: Prepare component specs and missing state inventories before agents generate UI code.
